# Pull Request

## What changed

Brief description of what this PR adds, fixes, or removes.

## Why

Link to the issue or discussion this addresses. If there isn't one, explain the motivation.

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New skill or skill update
- [ ] New example
- [ ] Doc update
- [ ] Tooling / infra (issue templates, workflows, etc.)

## Voice checklist (for any user-facing copy)

- [ ] No em-dashes anywhere in the diff
- [ ] Opens with the reader's situation, not preamble
- [ ] Tells the story before naming the framework
- [ ] Closes with at most one question
- [ ] Doesn't name authors, books, podcasts, or companies from the corpus
- [ ] Doesn't hedge ("it depends", "could be") on settled questions

## Testing

- [ ] If this touches a skill file, I tested it in the actual client
- [ ] If this touches an example, I ran the prompt end-to-end and the output matched the example
- [ ] If this touches docs/, I checked the rendered MDX on staging.pmmsherpa.com/docs

## Screenshots (if visual)

(Drop screenshots here.)

## Related issues

Closes #
